Localization.Description: A user performed an action with a service

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} created WAB service "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} removed WAB service "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed WAB service "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
